utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these sections. Each one has detailed specifications: health_coverage lists plan name, coverage types, features, and global coverage; property_coverage lists features and exclusions; travel_coverage lists features and coverage regions; additional_services lists multiple service features; total_budget provides both current and proposed monthly costs, savings, and currency. All required items are fully specified with appropriate details and costs where relevant.
